examples.title: Reverse a String
examples.description: Demonstrates iterating over characters backward and building a new string efficiently.

examples.title: Normalize and Compare Emails
examples.description: Shows trimming whitespace and comparing case-insensitively to determine equivalence.
examples.pseudocode:
function sameEmail(a, b):
  if a is null or b is null: return false
  set na = lowercase(trim(a))
  set nb = lowercase(trim(b))
  return na equals nb

examples.title: Find Longest Word in a Sentence
examples.description: Splits on whitespace, cleans punctuation, and tracks the longest token.
examples.pseudocode:
function longestWord(sentence):
  if sentence is null or empty: return ""
  words = split(trim(sentence)) on whitespace
  longest = ""
  for each w in words:
    clean = remove non-letter chars from w
    if length(clean) > length(longest): longest = clean
  return longest
